name: Monitor Size Calculator
notes: SITE #1 — proves the full pipeline end-to-end (§15). Inputs: diagonal (in/cm), aspect ratio (16:9, 16:10, 21:9, 4:3, 32:9, custom W:H). Outputs: width/height (in+cm), area, PPI (optional resolution input), size-comparison table of common monitors. Pure math (w = d*cos(atan(h:w)) etc.). Edge cases: zero/negative input, absurd values (>200in warn), unit persistence in localStorage. MPA long-tail landing pages e.g. /27-inch-monitor-dimensions/.

evidence: Opus review FIX-FIRST finding resolved (landing-page tool embeds, commit 114e23b)
prod live at site-monitorsizecalculator.vercel.app: 200 + X-Robots-Tag noindex
Analytics dashboard-enable + Sentry deferred per G0 deviations

name: Speech Length Calculator
notes: Paste text OR word-count input -> speaking time at 100-180 WPM (slider + slow/avg/fast presets) + silent-reading time. Live word/char count. Edge cases: empty input, huge paste (cap 200k chars), unicode. Landing pages e.g. /how-many-words-is-a-5-minute-speech/.

evidence: 46/46 playwright (32 verbatim oracle pairs incl. NBSP hex-verified)
independent verifier PASS: 6 pairs hand-recomputed incl. both half-up ties + emoji code-point case

notes_override: BUILT-AHEAD per operator instruction 2026-07-15 (continue creating other websites; batch domain purchases). G1 (Ahrefs volume + D-11 price) and G2 (spec approval) close in the bulk [HUMAN] session — scorecard 22.5/35 marginal-BUILD flagged for that review. Spec DRAFT; adversarial review in progress.

name: PD (Pupillary Distance) Ruler
notes: On-screen mm ruler calibrated by: credit-card width (85.60mm nominal per ISO/IEC 7810 ID-1; real cards 85.37-85.90mm, state in accuracy notes), known screen size, or manual slider. Step-by-step PD measurement guide (mirror method + photo method, textual only). Medical-adjacent disclaimer required (design doc §13.6): not a medical device, verify with your optician. No camera/ML in v1 (build risk) — documented as future.

name: Online Protractor
notes: SVG protractor (180/360 degree toggle), draggable rotating arm(s) reading out angle; image-upload underlay to measure angles in photos; keyboard nudge. Edge cases: touch support, retina scaling. Note: exact-match domain onlineprotractor.com is verified TAKEN (design doc §2.2) — realprotractor.com is the selected available domain for this tool.

name: Phone Size Comparison
notes: Select 2-3 phones -> to-scale side-by-side outlines (mm dimensions) + spec table (dimensions/weight/display). Dataset data/phones.json seeded with ~100 current phones; every entry carries source + retrieved fields (manufacturer spec pages) — AI must fetch real dimensions, never invent (design doc §7.2); HUMAN spot-checks 10 random entries. Landing pages per popular pair e.g. /iphone-16-vs-galaxy-s25-size/. Dataset discipline proven on this site per rollout roadmap (§15).

name: JSON Diff Checker
notes: Two panes -> structural diff (added/removed/changed), text-diff fallback for invalid JSON, all client-side. ASSUMPTION: design doc §2.2 backups list is a general pool not explicitly mapped per-slug except A2; backup_domains left empty here rather than inventing an association.

name: YAML <-> JSON Converter
notes: Bidirectional converter, error surfacing with line numbers, client-side (use a maintained parser lib, pinned at P2).

name: cURL -> Code
rank_difficulty: curlconverter.com is OSS incumbent — differentiate on UX
notes: Parse curl command -> generate Python requests / JS fetch / Node axios / PHP / Go snippets. Start with the 80% subset of curl flags; document unsupported flags explicitly.

name: SQL Formatter
notes: Format/beautify + minify, dialect select, client-side via a maintained formatter lib (pinned at P2).

name: Regex Tester
notes: Live match highlighting, groups table, cheatsheet, common-patterns library. JS regex engine only (state this on-page).
